name: a9n
description: AI-agnostic workflow orchestration. A port of Claude Code's Workflow tool whose agent() primitive hits any OpenAI-compatible LLM provider. Requires `bun` on PATH and an LLM endpoint + key.

base_url.title: LLM base URL
base_url.description: OpenAI-compatible base URL for the chat-completions endpoint (no trailing slash). Works with OpenAI, Anthropic-compatible gateways, Groq, OpenRouter, Ollama, vLLM, etc. Falls back to OPENAI_BASE_URL, then https://api.openai.com/v1.

api_key.title: LLM API key
api_key.description: Bearer token for the endpoint. Falls back to the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable when left blank. Leave blank for keyless local endpoints (e.g. Ollama).

model.title: Default model
model.description: Model id used by agent() calls that don't pass their own `model`. Falls back to OPENAI_MODEL, then gpt-4o-mini.

workflows_dir.title: Saved workflows directory
workflows_dir.description: Optional directory searched when a script calls workflow("<name>") or the tool is invoked with a `name`. Looks for <name>.workflow.js. Falls back to the plugin's bundled workflows/ directory.
